name: SKELETON_FUNCTION__MEMBER_LOOKUP__ASSIGNEE__YEAR_2024
description: Independent frame skeleton for discovering 2024 assignees constrained by functional category.
cypher_template:
MATCH (f:Functional_of_Target {name: $functional_of_target})<-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year = $year
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10
examples: Which companies entered target pairs containing Angiogenesis_Vascular_Target targets in 2024?
Which companies entered target pairs containing GammaDelta_T_Cell_Activation_Target targets in 2024?
Which companies entered target pairs containing Cytokine_Ligand_Target targets in 2024?
